Bed Bath & Beyond, Inc. (NYSE: BBBY) is an e-commerce-focused home goods retailer operating BedBathAndBeyond.com, Overstock.com, buybuy BABY, and related brands. It acquired Bed Bath & Beyond's intellectual property assets out of bankruptcy in 2023 and has since rebranded, expanded into physical stores via acquisitions like Kirkland’s/The Brand House Collective, and maintains a blockchain asset portfolio alongside home furnishings, furniture, décor, bedding, and kitchen products.

Poshmark is a leading social commerce marketplace that enables individuals to buy and sell new or gently used fashion, home goods, beauty, and electronics through a mobile-first app. It emphasizes community-driven discovery, social sharing, and sustainable resale. The platform has over 80 million users and is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Naver Corporation since 2023.
